events.title: EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Topology Meets Nonlinear Optics: New Frontiers in Nanophotonic Devices
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Professor Mohammad Hafezi from the University of Maryland discusses new frontiers in nanophotonic devices by exploring the intersection of topology and nonlinear optics.

events.title: EECS Colloquium | Can AI assist in Mathematics and Computer Science research?
events.location: 310 (Banatao Auditorium) - Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A colloquium exploring the potential of Artificial Intelligence to aid in research within the fields of Mathematics and Computer Science.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Direct Atomic Layer Processing (DALP®)

events.description: A joint colloquium and seminar focusing on the development and application of formal models for language generation.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Magic State Cultivation on a Superconducting Quantum Processor
